thesis_contribution: Enables Byzantine-robust FL at scale through trust adaptation
Reduces verification overhead from O(N) to O(k) where k < N

practical_impact.scalability: Enables FL with 1.0x more clients for same compute budget
practical_impact.deployment_feasibility: Makes Byzantine-robust FL practical for resource-constrained environments
